title: dendranthema seticuspe f. borealis
intro: Dendranthema seticuspe f. borealis, also known as the Asian mountain chrysanthemum, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. The herb is often prepared in infusions, teas, or dried flower forms for medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
